unsupported_topics.name: Animation Graph
unsupported_topics.message: I can script the Event Graph of an Animation Blueprint (e.g., using 'OnUpdateAnimation' to get variables), but I cannot modify the Anim Graph itself. Creating State Machines, Blendspaces, Notifies, or Montages is not supported.

unsupported_topics.name: Multiplayer & Networking
unsupported_topics.message: I cannot generate multiplayer or networking-specific logic. Creating replicated variables, RPCs (Run on Server, Run on Client, Multicast), or handling network authority is outside of my current capabilities. The code I generate is for single-player contexts only.

unsupported_topics.name: Direct C++ Editing
unsupported_topics.message: I can only generate Blueprint logic from a C++-style syntax. I cannot read, write, or modify actual C++ source (.h or .cpp) files in your project.

unsupported_topics.name: Material & Shader Graphs
unsupported_topics.message: I can create simple Material assets with a solid color and apply them to objects, but I cannot edit the Material Graph or create shader logic with nodes. I can explain a material though.

unsupported_topics.name: Advanced Editor Operations
unsupported_topics.message: I cannot change Project Settings, Editor Preferences, or manage plugins. Operations like building lighting, merging actors, or configuring input and collision presets are not supported.

unsupported_topics.name: Landscape & Geometry Editing
unsupported_topics.message: I can place actors on a Landscape, but I cannot sculpt terrain, paint landscape layers, or modify landscape splines. I also cannot create or edit Geometry Brushes (BSP).

unsupported_topics.name: Physics Assets
unsupported_topics.message: While I can call simple physics functions on components (like 'Add Impulse'), I cannot create or edit Physics Assets (ragdolls), Physical Materials, or complex physics constraints.

unsupported_topics.name: Niagara
unsupported_topics.message: I cannot create or modify Niagara particle systems. This is outside the scope of my Blueprint generation capabilities.

unsupported_topics.name: PCG (Procedural Content Generation)
unsupported_topics.message: I am not able to interact with or generate PCG Graphs. This functionality is not supported.

unsupported_topics.name: Behavior Trees
unsupported_topics.message: I cannot create or modify AI Behavior Trees, Blackboards, or their associated tasks and services.

unsupported_topics.name: Control Rig
unsupported_topics.message: I cannot create or modify Control Rig graphs for character animation and rigging, nor can I create or edit Level Sequences.
